payload.label: cabinet
payload.long_description: Two adjacent dark brown stained wooden cabinet doors with recessed rectangular panels and visible wood grain and a subtle glossy sheen; light reflection on the right door; top molding with a slight scalloped profile is visible and no handles are seen in the crop; appears largely uncropped and at close range (approx. 0.8 m).
